truthiness-and-empty-values.label: Truthiness and Empty Values
truthiness-and-empty-values.summary: Understand how empty strings, zero, None, and collections behave in conditions.

q1.title: Check Truthiness of Values
q1.prompt: Write a function that checks if a value is truthy or falsy.
q1.hint: Focus on the programming task being asked for, not on copying final solution text.

1.title: Understanding Truthiness
1.bodyMarkdown: In Python, values like empty strings, zero, and None are considered false in conditional statements. This concept is known as truthiness.

2.title: Empty Values
2.bodyMarkdown: An empty string ('') or a collection (like an empty list or dictionary) evaluates to false. Understanding this helps in writing effective conditional statements.
